examples: He rested his back against the schoolroom door.
In the schoolroom next door there was a lot of noise from Sara's party.
One day, all of a sudden, he proposed that each one in turn should jump off the bench in our schoolroom.
John Roland Reader, For services to the Captain Cook Schoolroom Museum, Great Ayton, North Yorkshire.
When I set up the schoolroom with my stuffed animals in my bedroom, I became a teacher.
